title: Enable or disable Comment-to-Message for a Business Account
content:
Use this endpoint to enable or disable the Comment-to-Message feature for a Business Account. The Comment-to-Message feature enables businesses to proactively engage with users by sending direct messages in response to high-intent comments on their video posts. A high-intent comment is one that expresses a strong intention to purchase or seek further information. When you enable this feature, the TikTok system will identify those high-intent comments, allowing you to send customized replies using [/business/message/send/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184403754242) and assist these users more effectively. > **Note** > - The Comment-to-Message feature is only available for Business Accounts registered in Vietnam, Indonesia, and Thailand. > - Once you enable Comment-to-Message for a Business Account, the Business Account can only reply to comments published by TikTok accounts that are registered in the APAC, LATAM, and METAP regions. ## Before you start Ensure the Business Account meets the following eligibility requirements: - The account owner is over 18 years old. - The account is a [Registered Business Account](https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/about-business-registration) or a Business Account that has run [TikTok Messaging Ads](https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/about-tiktok-messaging-ads). - The messaging permissions "Potential connections" and "Other on TikTok" of the account are set to "Requests". ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/direct_reply/update/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Access token authorized by TikTok Business Account owner.
To obtain an access token, use [/tt_user/oauth2/token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1738084387220481#item-link-Get%20a%20TikTok%20account%20access%20token).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type.
Allowed value: `application/json`.| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |business_id {Required}|string|Application specific unique identifier for the TikTok Business Account.
Pass the value of the `open_id` field returned in the response of [/tt_user/oauth2/token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1738084387220481#item-link-Get%20a%20TikTok%20account%20access%20token) to this field.| |direct_reply_type {Required}|string|The type of direct reply.

Enum value:
  • `COMMENT_TO_MESSAGE`: Comment-to-Message. Once you enable this feature, the TikTok system will identify high-intent comments, enabling you to send customized replies to assist these users more effectively.
| |operation_status {Required}|string|The operation to perform.

Enum values:
  • `ENABLE`: To enable the Comment-to-Message feature.
  • `DISABLE`: To disable the Comment-to-Message feature.
| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/direct_reply/update/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "business_id": "{{business_id}}", "direct_reply_type": "COMMENT_TO_MESSAGE", "operation_status": "ENABLE" }' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code|number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id|string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| |data|object|Returned data.
For a successful request, this field will be an empty object (`{}`).| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": {} } (/code) ```
